S.FORM: Johnny Baum sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA. kawas tay 1946, ryax sa tay 17 nqu tay 6, Johnny Baum, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
